title: cosmo_fate: A preregistered fragility audit of DESI-era cosmic-fate claims
description: Pipeline, frozen preregistration plan, null-calibration mocks, and full posterior chains for "Is cosmic fate an inference or an assumption? A preregistered fragility audit of the heat-death conclusion with DESI DR2, Pantheon+, and Planck." Differentiates the fate verdict (Big Rip vs. heat death) along eight assumption axes -- dataset, prior, inference statistic, and w(a) parametrization -- and calibrates the verdict's direction against one hundred exact-LCDM null mocks.
